case_title: MARISELA AYAR ET AL VS. ROLANDO HERNANDEZ ET AL

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-11-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-11-2017 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFFS WERE PRESENT, ASSISTED BY SPANISH INTERPRETER KENNETH WRIGHT. DEFENDANTS ROLANDO HERNANDEZ AND HARRY MING WERE PRESENT AND BOTH DEFENDANTS WAIVE SERVICE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: J.BERTELSEN. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-11-2017 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF AYAR, MARISELA ARRONA, JOSE IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT HERNANDEZ, ROLANDO DBA EUR-ASIA MOTORS, AUTO COLL CTR MING, HARRY DBA EUR-ASIA MOTORS,  AUTO COLLISION CENTER STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,500.00 FILED BY AYAR, MARISELA ARRONA, JOSE AS TO DEFENDANT HERNANDEZ, ROLANDO DBA EUR-ASIA MOTORS, AUTO COLL CTR MING, HARRY DBA EUR-ASIA MOTORS,  AUTO COLLISION CENTER ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-11-2017 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
